experiences.title: Software Engineer II
points: Rebuilt existing search backend with ElasticSearch, consolidating two separate backends to one after company merger.
Reduced backend maintenance by 80% and licensing cost by $300k/yr.
Redesigned and implemented new search-pagination API for our highest value clients.
Assumed Release Coordinator role for globally deployed suite of microservices underpinning core platform.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
points: Developed a customer experience chatbot to replace existing Live Chat which drives 5% of ecommerce sales.
Improved average response time from 90 seconds to under 2 seconds which quadrupled chat traffic.
Presented directly to the Global Brand President, after receiving unprecedented approval from both our immediate manager and senior management—a first for any intern initiative.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
points: Spearheaded an intern team to develop a demo AR chat app for prototype holographic glasses developed overseas.
Ported and set up hardware-accelerated cross-compiling of existing cpp codebase for new prototype hardware.
Developed a high efficiency low-latency media streaming pipeline optimized for live online user interactions.

experiences.title: Contract Software Engineer
points: Developed an advanced AR experience using Unity Engine and C# with ARFoundation, allowing users at specific locations, such as street corners, to interact with realistic Augmented Reality representations of historical structures and artifacts blended into their real-world surroundings.
Secured $55k contract with demo, documented and designed the source code as the basis for final product.

projects.name: Options Trading Bot
projects.description: Real-time quantitative options trading bot built on the QuantConnect platform. Used for backtesting and live paper trading my proprietary options valuation framework.

projects.name: Cherry
projects.description: Web application that enables users to easily search for courses offered at UIUC.

projects.name: ChannelAdder
projects.description: A tensorflow program which attempts to upmix stereo sound into 5.1 surround sound.

projects.name: Ebay UMLC
projects.description: eBay 2022 University Machine Learning Competition, placing top 10 with a 90% NER accuracy.

projects.name: CrashModeArchitecture
projects.description: A buggy architecture which has its own programming and assembly language including an assembler, disassembler, compiler, and emulator.

projects.name: Linux Kernel
projects.description: Supported memory paging, i8259 PIC interrupt handling, exception handling, keyboard input buffer, in memory read-only filesystem, round-robin scheduling based on Programmable Interrupt Timer with multiple tele-terminals.

projects.name: LC-3 in SystemVerilog
projects.description: Created a fully functional LC-3 Computer in SystemVerilog, which is an instruction set supported by gcc.

projects.name: RISC-V Processor Verification
projects.description: Wrote full instruction verification and cross-validation test bench for a RISC-V processor in system verilog.
